progress:
# GSD-T Progress

## Project: GSD-T Framework (@tekyzinc/gsd-t)
## Status: M38 EXECUTING — Wave 1 Domain H1 through T6 committed; H1-T7 checkpoint bundled in v3.11.12; MR next
## Date: 2026-04-16
## Version: 3.11.12 (current); M38 target 3.12.10

## Current Milestone

**M38: Headless-by-Default + Meter Reduction**

**Goal**: Make headless the default subagent spawn path so the parent context grows much slower and the meter mostly stops mattering. Strip the meter to its irreducible core. Reform the unattended watch tick to surface real worker activity in the interactive chat. Net result: same "work never stops" UX achieved by structure instead of instrumentation, with ~5,000 LOC removed and the dead-meter regression class eliminated entirely.

**Scope IN**:
1. **Headless as default subagent spawn** — promote `bin/headless-auto-spawn.cjs` from "emergency pivot when meter says stop" to the default spawn primitive across orchestrator + every command file (execute, wave, integrate, quick, debug, scan, verify); results land via existing read-back banner on next user message.
2. **`--watch` flag** (replaces `--in-context`) — opt-in streaming for primary work spawns only; does NOT propagate to validation spawns (QA, Red Team, Design Verification, doc-ripple); rejected by unattended supervisor; default off.
3. **Unattended watch tick reform** — workers emit structured events to `.gsd-t/events/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl` (`task_start`, `task_complete`, `subagent_verdict`, `file_changed`, `test_result`, `error`, `retry`); 270s tick reads new events and formats compact human-scannable activity log instead of "iter N, exit 0" heartbeat.
4. **Meter reduction** — KEEP local-estimator hook + one-band threshold + `getSessionStatus()` backstop. DELETE `bin/runway-estimator.cjs`, `bin/token-telemetry.cjs`, three-band model in `bin/token-budget.cjs`, dead-meter detection / stale band, per-spawn token bracket bash blocks across all command files, Universal Auto-Pause Rule MANDATORY STOP banner (replaced with silent orchestrator-triggered headless spawn at threshold).
5. **Self-improvement loop deletion** — delete commands `gsd-t-optimization-apply`, `gsd-t-optimization-reject`, `gsd-t-reflect`, `gsd-t-audit`; delete `bin/qa-calibrator.js`, `qa-miss-log.jsonl` plumbing, `.gsd-t/optimization-backlog.md` references.
6. **Conversational mode in router** — delete commands `gsd-t-prompt`, `gsd-t-brainstorm`, `gsd-t-discuss`; add intent classifier to `commands/gsd.md` (workflow → existing command; conversational → respond directly; ambiguous → default to conversation).
lastDecisionLogEntry: - 2026-04-16 15:08: [M38-H1] Wrapped H1-T6 — added `unattended` passthrough subcommand to bin/gsd-t.js (delegates to bin/gsd-t-unattended.cjs) so the defense-in-depth test HD-T6 passes. All 11 headless-default tests now green. Full suite 1234/1242 pass (8 failures: 7 stranded context-meter tests owned by MR per TD-102, 1 pre-existing scan.test.js live-state test unrelated to M38). Wave 1 Domain H1 effectively complete across T1-T6; next is H1-T7 checkpoint commit + M38-CP1.
